_readme: Project cards, rendered in array order. To add: copy an object, fill fields, set visible:true. Honesty rules in docs/UPDATING.md — do not overclaim.

projects.title: Kumbh Reunite
projects.event: India's first Claude Impact Lab (Anthropic-partnered), Mumbai
projects.description: Missing-person reunification system designed for the Nashik Kumbh Mela 2027 (80M+ expected pilgrims), built at an invite-only, one-day lab — 200 builders curated from 2,000+ applicants alongside engineers from J.P. Morgan, IBM, EY and Reliance Jio. A unified registry connects 10 previously disconnected missing-person centres, with human-in-the-loop AI assistance on top.
projects.myRole: Owned the smart PA announcement queue end-to-end (Claude-generated announcements in the case's own language, broadcast on a timed cycle), and wired the 2,500-case synthetic dataset with 1,280 CCTV locations across 32 zones into Firebase so the demo ran on realistic data. Proposed the role-based access model adopted in the system design.
highlights: Multilingual duplicate detection (LaBSE embeddings, always human-confirmed)
Clothing-colour photo filter for the 371 cases with no name, only a photo
Police command dashboard with live risk scoring across 32 zones
Design principle stated on stage: no facial recognition, no location tracking — AI shows options, a human decides
projects.linkNote: Demoed live at the event; the shared team backend was retired afterwards.

projects.title: ResQ VoiceForward
projects.event: Airavat 3.0 National Hackathon, IEEE CS SPIT
projects.description: A real-time AI intelligence layer that sits behind human crisis-helpline operators — explicitly not a chatbot, it never talks to callers or acts autonomously on safety decisions. Live multilingual transcription across 22 Indian languages + English with code-switching support, feeding a multi-agent pipeline for live emotion and risk detection.
highlights: Sarvam AI (Saras v3) live transcription, 22 Indian languages + English
Multi-agent risk/emotion pipeline over WebSockets (FastAPI + Socket.io)

projects.title: Ethos
projects.description: Agentic developer-onboarding platform: a chat-based 'Day 0 to ready-to-code' journey that replaces fragmented GitHub/Slack/Jira/Confluence onboarding, with reverse-RAG knowledge verification and a live architecture graph.
projects.myRole: Built the Slack-history mining feature — it retrieves how past employees solved the same problem from old Slack conversations and surfaces structured, relevant answers to new hires asking similar questions.
highlights: Reverse RAG — verifies a new hire's understanding instead of just answering
'Architecture Twin' service-dependency graph in Neo4j (teammates' build)
RAG pipeline: LangChain + ChromaDB + Gemini API

projects.title: Vidyasarthi
projects.event: SE Field Project — piloted with Indrajeet Academy, Thane
projects.description: Institute management app designed from field research at a real tutoring institute — the team observed manual attendance/fee workflows on site and built for the pain points found. Five role-based modules (Student, Parent, Teacher, Admin, Admin Staff) with RBAC so each role sees only its data: dashboards for schedules, test scores, syllabus tracking and fees.
highlights: Field research with a real client institute, not a toy spec
Role-based access control across five distinct user types

projects.title: BloodConnect
projects.description: Location-based real-time blood donor–patient matching. Live donor map (Google Maps JS API) rendering recipient location against nearby compatible donors, blood-bank stock visibility, and one-click patient→donor contact.
highlights: Interactive donor map with location-optimized matching
